title: XR808g
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=XR808g |designer= |manufacturer=[[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] |line=[[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] |model=[[YT-1000 light freighter/Legends|YT-1000 light freighter]] |type=[[Light freighter/Legends|Light freighter]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=35 ABY |retired= |battles= |affiliation= |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Jae Juun]] |captains= |crewmembers=[[Tarfang]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|You haven't heard of the XR-eight-oh-eight-g?''"
"''Should we have?''"
"''Not if I've been doing my job.|[[Jae Juun]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''}} '''XR808g''', or the '''''Exxer''''', was the smuggling vessel owned and operated by [[Jae Juun]], a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], and his [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] copilot, [[Tarfang]]. It was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-1000 light freighter/Legends|YT-1000]]. Its saucer-shaped hull had the cockpit directly on top with four [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons arranged around it. When Juun accompanied [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] nest at [[Qoribu]], the ship was destroyed by [[Gorog]] [[dartship]]s while flying via [[slave circuit]], allowing the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and all present to survive the Gorog attack. ==Name== {{Quote|XR-eight-oh-eight-g? What kind of a name is that?''"
"''It's a Galactic Alliance registration number, of course.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Jae Juun]]|}} The ship's "name" was simply the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] registration number for the ''Exxer''. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=XR808g |es=XR808g }} [[Category:Smuggler starships]] [[Category:YT-1000 light freighters]]
